name: Bottom-Up DP
summary: For every amount from 1 up to the target, try each coin and keep the fewest coins that reach it.
visualizationIntent: init: draw a dp cell for every amount 0..amount; every cell starts at the 'infinity' sentinel amount+1 except dp[0] which is 0. loop: a blue pointer a sweeps left to right over the amounts; for each amount every coin is tried. check: when a coin fits, the source cell dp[a-coin] flashes blue and the readout shows dp[a-coin]+1 compared to the current dp[a]. update: if that is fewer coins, dp[a] drops to the new value and flashes. return: dp[amount] turns green; if it is still the sentinel the amount is unreachable and the answer is -1, otherwise it is the fewest coins.

lineExplanations.3: Create a table of fewest-coin counts for every amount from 0 to the target, all set to a large 'infinity' sentinel (amount+1) meaning unreachable.
lineExplanations.4: Base case: it takes zero coins to make the amount 0.
lineExplanations.5: Solve every amount from 1 up to the target, smallest first.
lineExplanations.6: Try each available coin denomination for this amount.
lineExplanations.7: Only use a coin that is not larger than the amount we are making.
lineExplanations.8: Check whether taking this coin (one more than the count for amount-coin) beats the best count so far for this amount.
lineExplanations.9: It is better, so record the smaller coin count for this amount.
lineExplanations.10: After filling the table, check whether the target amount was ever reached.
lineExplanations.11: The target is still the infinity sentinel — it cannot be made, so the answer is -1.
lineExplanations.13: The target was reached, so read the fewest-coins count from dp[amount].
lineExplanations.14: Return the fewest number of coins (or -1 if impossible).

syntaxExplanations.1: class Solution: defines the class wrapper LeetCode expects.
syntaxExplanations.2: def coinChange(self, coins, amount): defines the method receiving the coin list and target.
syntaxExplanations.3: [amount + 1] * (amount + 1) builds a list of amount+1 copies of the sentinel value.
syntaxExplanations.4: dp[0] = 0 stores 0 in the first slot.
syntaxExplanations.5: for a in range(1, amount + 1): loops a over 1, 2, ..., amount.
syntaxExplanations.6: for coin in coins: loops coin over each denomination in the list.
syntaxExplanations.7: if coin <= a: runs the block only when the coin fits inside the amount.
syntaxExplanations.8: if dp[a - coin] + 1 < dp[a]: compares the candidate count to the current best.
syntaxExplanations.9: dp[a] = dp[a - coin] + 1 stores the improved coin count.
syntaxExplanations.10: if dp[amount] > amount: is true only when dp[amount] is still the sentinel.
syntaxExplanations.11: result = -1 marks the amount as impossible to make.
syntaxExplanations.13: result = dp[amount] reads the answer from the last relevant slot.
syntaxExplanations.14: return result hands the answer back to the caller.
